affected_locations.label: source
affected_locations.detail: web_push_subscriptions stores endpoint and key material.

affected_locations.label: root_control
affected_locations.detail: Current owner_all permits authenticated user-managed rows without endpoint validation.

affected_locations.label: closest_control
affected_locations.detail: Client-side PushManager provenance is bypassable by direct Data API writes.

affected_locations.label: entrypoint/wrapper
affected_locations.detail: Service-role cron reads all subscription rows when enabled.

evidence: Authenticated owner-managed endpoint row is consumed by independent service-role coach-push sender. No runtime PoC was attempted because top-level validation was out of scope.
proof_gap: Need centralized validation of feature enablement, web-push URL handling, allowed schemes/hosts, and Supabase Edge egress reachability.

facts.entry: Supabase Data API write to web_push_subscriptions for own user_id
facts.trust_boundary: user-controlled stored endpoint to service-role proactive coach sender
facts.impact: SSRF/callback abuse and possible exposure of push request metadata/VAPID authorization to attacker-selected endpoint
facts.counterevidence: Cron secret and feature flag gate execution, but do not prove stored endpoint provenance; feature flag default-off is a reportability precondition.
